title: Extension Add
description: Add new functionality to existing types without access to their source code using extensions.
problemStatement:
Extending power! Add an extension to the built-in `Int` type that provides a computed property `isEven` returning a `Bool`.

**Requirement:** Use the `%` modulo operator to check divisibility by 2.
hints: Extensions allow you to add features to types even if you didn't create them (like standard library types).
